name: Miller Mulligans
about: Miller Mulligans is a year-round golf simulator facility powered by Trackman technology. They utilize dual radar technology in simulators that can accommodate up to 6 players per bay, offering access to over 230 championship golf courses. The venue provides industry-leading shot analysis statistics at the moment of impact, tracking ball speed, club speed, spin data, and club head angle, along with 30 more data fields to help refine swings. It is also home to a Performance Studio for swing analysis, fitting, and practice, with options for private lessons and new club fittings. The venue supports various activities including individual practice, group events, private leagues, and VIP memberships, and also offers training and coaching through a partnership with RTE Health & Performance.
why_golfers_like_it: Access to over 230 of the world's most iconic golf courses
Industry-leading Trackman dual radar technology provides precise shot analysis with over 30 data points
Cozy and professional environment suitable for both individual practice and business meetings
Year-round facility, perfect for off-season practice and lower handicaps
Versatile space accommodating both individual players and large groups

simulator_hardware.notes: Utilizes dual radar technology for shot analysis

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: You are encouraged to bring your own clubs. The venue is designed for personal practice and fitting with your own equipment.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food or drinks?
faq.answer: There is no mention of an on-site kitchen or bar, so it appears external food and drink are not permitted.

faq.question: How long does it typically take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: No specific information about the time to play 18 holes is provided on the website.

faq.question: Is Miller Mulligans kid-friendly?
faq.answer: No, there is no mention of junior programs or specific amenities for children, making it unclear if it's kid-friendly.
